name: Expense entry create flow
description: Full-stack expense creation: user-scoped POST /api/v1/expenses with visibility rules (private default, household requires explicit household_id), global static category/source pickers (feat-016), payer defaulting to current user, currency auto-default (VND or household default), conditional household picker. Includes DB migration 0003 for category_key/source_key columns and constraint changes. Excludes edit/delete, search/pagination, groups, quick-add, and member payer list.
evidence: Feature implementation completed and marked done in harness.
